What makes Forged different

Built for the person
who actually shows up.

Most habit apps make you feel guilty. Forged makes you feel capable.

🎙️
Voice reflections
Speak your quick notes and reflections — transcribed automatically. Capture the thought before it's gone, hands-free after a workout or commute.
🔥
Streak protection
Skip days protect your streak without logging. Life happens. A missed day isn't a reset — it's a skip. Your chain stays intact, your momentum stays alive.
⚒️
5 habit types
Daily check-ins. Weekly targets. Progress goals. Build projects with time + wins. Limit trackers. One app for the full shape of your self-improvement.
📓
Automatic journal
Every tap, note, win, and reflection is saved forever. Scroll back through your journey — see who you were becoming, day by day.
📊
Insights that matter
12-week heatmaps, best streaks, completion rates. You'll see the patterns in your data that your brain couldn't track on its own.
🤖
AI habit coach Supporter
Coaching based on your actual habit data — not generic advice. Knows your streaks, your wins, your hard parts. Talks to you like a coach who's been watching.
How it works

Simple enough to stick to.
Deep enough to matter.

1
Add your habits
Choose the type that fits — daily, weekly, a limit you're reducing, a goal you're climbing toward, or a project you're building. Up to 5 free.
2
Log every day
One tap to log. Add a voice note or reflection if you want. Each entry builds a permanent record of your consistency — not just a number.
3
Watch it compound
Streaks build. Patterns emerge. The journal fills up. You start to see who you're becoming — not just who you want to be.
Pricing

Simple. Honest.
Locked in forever.

Start free. Upgrade when you outgrow 5 habits. Beta testers keep their price forever — even after we raise it.

Loading spots...
Beta price is yours forever — it won't increase when we publicly launch.
iPhone / iPad

Add to your
home screen.

No App Store needed. Forged works as a full-screen app on iPhone — open it like any other app, it loads instantly, and works offline.

Android too
On Android, tap the ⋮ menu in Chrome, then Add to Home Screen. Works exactly the same.
1
🧭
Open in Safari
Forged must be opened in Safari on iPhone — not Chrome or Firefox. The install option only appears in Safari.
2
⬆️
Tap Share
Tap the Share button at the bottom of Safari — it looks like a box with an arrow pointing up.
3
➕
Add to Home Screen
Scroll down in the share menu and tap Add to Home Screen. Give it a name or leave it as Forged.
4
📱
Tap Add
Confirm and you're done. Forged appears on your home screen and opens full-screen — no browser bar, no distractions.
💡 Tip: Once installed, open the app from your home screen tile — not from the browser. You'll get the full experience: instant load, full screen, push notifications when they're ready.

today.
